tweet.text: RT @SacramentoKings: give him his bike, punk. deebo out here grindin😤 https://t.co/gcqqk6YyuD

Just got my first copies of my upcoming book yesterday! 📕
📲 Pre-Order “Above the Noise” on @amazonbooks here: https://t.co/n6KA5zu01s https://t.co/Wgf6jUeNfO

RT @wellssssssssss: StoryTime with Deebo😂 @DeMar_DeRozan pulled up to 520! Dropping 30 with your shoes untied 🐐
https://t.co/4GQpTmhM6b ht…

LA Folks: I’m having a release event for my book Above the Noise on Monday September 9th at @GatheringSpots. Thank you to @malika_andrews for agreeing to moderate the event.
Reserve a spot here: https://t.co/7oIDJwtFw0 https://t.co/MVi5Q1DFKE
NY folks: I’ll be at the @NBASTORE on the 10th signing copies of Above the Noise https://t.co/D9Z2Ys3beJ

RT @NBASTORE: An NBA star, outspoken activist, and now, author — @DeMar_DeRozan is coming to NYC🗽📖
✍️ Hear his story and get your book sig…

Dropping season 2 of my “Dinners With DeMar” interview series soon. Thank you to @malika_andrews and @CP3 for opening up and helping me break the stigma around mental health. 🫡
🎥 https://t.co/MuiXjZYQmy https://t.co/FvvPnx730o

Today is World Mental Health Day! Working everyday to seek out and appreciate moments of calm has been a big part of my mental health journey. Let's create a world where everyone feels safe to talk about their mental health struggles. https://t.co/xUNeAe0Fjf
